info.name: CloudCampus — JNV Lucknow (v1)
info.description:
Full API collection — JNV Lucknow seed data.

**All passwords: Admin@123**

| Username | Role |
|---|---|
| superadmin | SUPER_ADMIN |
| schooladmin | SCHOOL_ADMIN |
| teacher1 | TEACHER (John Smith, Class 10) |
| student1 | STUDENT (Class 10-A) |
| parent1 | PARENT |

exec: if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('superToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

request.description: Sets {{superToken}} + {{authToken}}

exec: if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('schoolAdminToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

request.description: Sets {{schoolAdminToken}} + {{authToken}}

exec: if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('teacherToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

request.description: John Smith TEACHER. Sets {{teacherToken}} + {{authToken}}

exec: if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('studentToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

request.description: Class 10-A STUDENT. Sets {{studentToken}} + {{authToken}}

exec: if (j.success) { pm.environment.set('parentToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('authToken', j.data.accessToken); pm.environment.set('refreshToken', j.data.refreshToken); }

request.description: PARENT of student1. Sets {{parentToken}} + {{authToken}}
Verify OTP and set new password
Signs out of ALL devices. X-Revoked-Sessions header in response.
Returns all active device sessions for the authenticated user
Revoke a single device session by ID (set deviceId env var first)
Use superToken as authToken
Fetch single tenant detail
Sets tenant status to SUSPENDED
Restores SUSPENDED tenant to ACTIVE
All config keys with current or default values
Upsert a single config key. Change path segment for other keys.
Total / active / suspended / new-this-month counts
Returns enablement state of all features for a tenant
List all schools a user can access. Set targetUserId env var.
Grant a user access to an additional school
Revoke a user's access to a specific school
All available subscription tiers (FREE, BASIC, PREMIUM, ENTERPRISE)
Current subscription plan for a tenant
Assign or change a tenant's subscription plan
All system prompt templates
Create a new prompt template
Fetch a single prompt. Set aiPromptId env var.
Enable a prompt template
Disable a prompt template without deleting it
Dry-run: render template with variables, no AI call
All knowledge base documents for a tenant
Add a document to tenant knowledge base
Remove a knowledge document. Set kbDocId env var.
Semantic search over tenant knowledge base
Platform-wide AI token/call usage summary
AI usage breakdown for a specific tenant
Schools the authenticated school-admin can access (for school switcher)
Switch JWT context to a different school. Returns new accessToken.
KPIs: total students, attendance %, fee collection etc. Use schoolAdminToken.
Rajendra Prasad Singh
Suresh Chandra Gupta
Create Razorpay payment order for a fee record
Verify Razorpay payment signature and mark fee record paid
PCM+CS stream

body.raw:
{
  "title": "PTM \u2014 20 May 2026",
  "content": "Parent-Teacher Meeting at 10 AM in school hall.",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "targetAudience": "ALL",
  "validUntil": "2026-05-20"
}

request.description: Get website record for the school
Toggle the school website on/off
All pages for the school website
Create a new website page

body.raw: {"title": "About Us", "slug": "about", "published": true, "displayOrder": 1, "seoTitle": "About JNV Lucknow", "seoDescription": "Learn about our school"}

request.description: Update page metadata. Set pageId env var.
Delete a page and all its sections
All content sections for a page

body.raw: {"sectionType": "HERO", "position": 0, "content": {"headline": "Welcome to JNV Lucknow", "subtext": "Excellence in Education since 1988"}}

request.description: Add a content section to a page

body.raw: {"sectionType": "HERO", "position": 0, "content": {"headline": "JNV Lucknow — Navodaya Vidyalaya", "subtext": "Residential school of excellence", "imageUrl": ""}}

request.description: Update a section. Set sectionId env var.
Remove a content section
Navigation items for the school website
Add a navigation item
Update a nav item. Set navItemId env var.
Remove a nav item
Use teacherToken as authToken
Generate a QR code token for an existing attendance session
Create an attendance session and immediately generate a QR token
Use studentToken as authToken
Student scans QR code to self-mark attendance
Student initiates payment for own fee record
Returns student1 (Class 10-A). Use parentToken.
Teacher auth required
Get school website metadata + nav items for a tenant (no auth). Replace jnv-lucknow with actual tenant code.
Get a published page with all sections. Page must be published=true. Slug: home
Get about page with sections (if published)
